# FAF Resolved Agent Instructions
Build ID: sha256:8be51b3b56eac9da1d820c29630fd5f74e57de30ffbe06b0c1673064a5980c5d

## Instructions
- Inspect relevant context before changing files
- Report validation evidence
- Preserve unrelated user changes
- Validate changes proportionally to risk

## Policies
- Moderate or higher risk requires human review
- Production deployment is denied

## Policy decisions
- urn:faf:policy:reference-operations::deny-production-task matched=false: Production deployment is outside this reference policy.
- urn:faf:policy:reference-operations::review-moderate-risk matched=false: Moderate or higher risk requires human review.

## Constraints
- Do not modify implementation files

## Prohibited actions
- Claim approval authority
- Claim final approval authority
- Perform destructive repository operations

## Required human review
- Human review before operational use

## Quality gates
- urn:faf:gate:scope-and-evidence@1.0.0 (post-execution; failure: block)

## Authorized FAF tool references (informational only)
- urn:faf:tool:workspace-editor@1.0.0
